checks.expression: (async () => { await globalThis.venom.ready(); const value = await globalThis.venom.exports.runChessEngine({action:'identity'}); return value && value.protected === true && typeof value.runtime === 'string'; })()

(async () => { try { await globalThis.venom.exports.runChessEngine({action:'__invalid_runtime_probe__'}); return false; } catch (error) { return String(error).includes('unsupported chess engine action'); } })()
